settings.title: Villa Aegean
settings.summary: A two-bedroom villa with a heated infinity pool, ideal for families and friends.
settings.description:
Villa Aegean is a private world of its own: two bedrooms, an open living space and a heated infinity pool that pours toward the horizon.

With its own kitchen, sun terrace and direct sunset exposure, it is the resort's most generous accommodation — and its most secluded.
settings.rates:
Low season (Apr–May, Oct) | €540
Mid season (Jun, Sep) | €720
High season (Jul–Aug) | €980
settings.rates_note: Rates include breakfast and all taxes. Minimum 4 nights in high season.
settings.seo_description: A two-bedroom Santorini villa with a private heated infinity pool over the caldera.
